overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, showing a Space Marine in blue power armor exploring a dark gothic chapel interior with candlelit altars, following a robed Chaplain, meeting another marine with a winged cherub, and exiting into an industrial corridor. The scene features high-fidelity Unreal Engine 5 graphics with dramatic candlelight and atmospheric blue lighting.

agents.ego_description: following the robed Chaplain through the candlelit chapel interior, observing the ornate altars and gothic architecture

notable_agents.action: leading the way through the chapel wearing ornate black and gold robes with a skull-faced helmet

entered.detail: large stone altar covered with lit candles and religious artifacts
ornate stand holding multiple burning candles
ornate stand holding multiple burning candles
wide stone staircase leading up to the central altar platform
tall gothic archway with golden trim leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The player follows a robed Chaplain through a dimly lit gothic chapel. Candlelit altars line the marble floor while ornate stone stairs lead to a central shrine. The atmosphere is solemn with warm candlelight contrasting against the cool blue shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: chapel nave approaching the exit archway

events.description: approaching the large archway revealing the industrial corridor beyond
camera pans upward to reveal tall gothic windows with blue atmospheric light streaming through

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit archway and looking up at the tall windows and hanging banners before returning to the Chaplain

notable_agents.action: waiting near the archway, gesturing toward the exit

entered.detail: massive arched window with intricate tracery allowing blue light to enter
large vertical banner with imperial insignia hanging from the ceiling
view through the archway showing metal walkways and industrial lighting

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the chapel's exit archway, revealing a view into a dimly lit industrial corridor beyond. The camera pans up to show tall gothic windows and hanging imperial banners before returning to the Chaplain waiting by the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: chapel exit area with fellow Space Marine

events.description: player turns to face another Space Marine standing near the exit archway
a small golden winged cherub with a glowing red eye appears and hovers between the two Space Marines

agents.ego_description: meeting another Space Marine and observing the winged cherub that materializes between them before proceeding to the exit

notable_agents.action: standing with arms crossed, wearing black armor with gold trim and red helmet markings
small golden cherub with mechanical wings and glowing red eye hovering between the marines

entered.detail: small candle stand with lit candles near the archway exit

segments.scene_description: The player encounters another Space Marine in black armor near the exit. A small golden cherub with mechanical wings and a glowing red eye appears between them, hovering momentarily and looking at the player before the player continues toward the archway.

events.description: exiting the chapel through the large archway into the industrial corridor area
passing a robed adept in red standing by the metal railing

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into the industrial corridor, passing other Space Marines and a robed adept

notable_agents.action: robed adept in red standing by the railing, bowing head as the player passes

entered.detail: metal grating walkway extending into the industrial facility
large cylindrical metal support pillar with pipes and cables
ornate metal railing along the edge of the walkway
industrial equipment and structures visible in the green-lit distance

segments.scene_description: The player exits the chapel through the large archway into a dimly lit industrial corridor with metal walkways and support pillars. The lighting shifts to a greenish industrial hue as the player passes a robed adept and other Space Marines standing in the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a solemn gothic chapel that gradually transitions into a cold industrial corridor. It begins by following a robed Chaplain across marble floors lined with candlelit altars, where warm light contrasts against deep blue shadows. As the camera approaches the exit archway, it pans upward to capture towering gothic windows and hanging imperial banners before returning to the Chaplain waiting by the door. The scene then shifts to a brief encounter with a Space Marine in black armor and a hovering golden cherub with a glowing red eye, who lingers momentarily before the camera moves forward. Finally, the player passes through the archway, causing the lighting to shift from candlelight to a greenish industrial hue as the environment opens into a corridor of metal walkways and support pillars populated by robed adepts and other marines.
